_doc: Aldreth â€” a FINITE, fixed, hand-authored continent (the new primary world).
Unlike the old infinite spec, this declares world `bounds` (chunk space) with
every in-bounds, fixed region into shipped chunk data; regions flagged
fixed:false (e.g. the Tanglewild) keep generating procedurally at runtime.
Coordinates: regions/anchors in CHUNK space (1 chunk = 16 tiles); settlements,
roads and features in TILE space. Chunk c -> center tile (c*16 + 8).
name: The Realm of Aldreth

regions.name: Greenhollow Vale
regions.motif: The green heart of the realm; every road begins here.

regions.name: Aldspire
regions.motif: The white-walled capital on the river's bend.

regions.name: Brightfields
regions.motif: Amber wheat and hedgerows, the realm's breadbasket.

regions.name: Larkmeadow
regions.motif: Wildflower commons humming with bees.

regions.name: Mosswood
regions.motif: Cool broadleaf woods where the first wolves prowl.

regions.name: Oakshade Forest
regions.motif: Deep oak country; a dungeon mouth gapes among the roots.

regions.name: The Deepwood
regions.motif: Old-growth so thick the canopy swallows the sun.

regions.name: Wolfden
regions.motif: Dark spruce taiga howling on the western marches.

regions.name: Highmoor
regions.motif: Windswept purple moor on the realm's far shoulder.

regions.name: Westcape
regions.motif: A sunlit grove at the long western point, ringed by sea.

regions.name: Saltcove
regions.motif: A fishing town on the southern strand.

regions.name: Greywater Mire
regions.motif: Sunken fens of black water and biting flies.

regions.name: Bogmire
regions.motif: Peat hags and will-o'-wisps in the deep south.

regions.name: The Tanglewild
regions.motif: A steaming green tangle jutting into the southern sea.

regions.name: Eastreach
regions.motif: Golden grass plains rolling toward the eastern dunes.

regions.name: Emberscrub
regions.motif: Thornscrub and dust on the desert's doorstep.

regions.name: Duskreach
regions.motif: Cracked red hardpan where the grass gives out.

regions.name: Scorchplain
regions.motif: The first dunes, studded with saguaro and bone.

regions.name: Sunspear Dunes
regions.motif: A vast sand sea on the south-east cape; tomb-kings sleep beneath.

regions.name: Mirage Oasis
regions.motif: A jewel of palms and cool water amid the waste.

regions.name: The Salt Pan
regions.motif: Blinding white flats at the peninsula's burning tip.

regions.name: Ashfall
regions.motif: Scorched grey ash at the mountain's foot.

regions.name: Cinderpeak
regions.motif: The smoking caldera crowning the north; rivers of fire.

regions.name: The Geysers
regions.motif: Steam vents and bubbling pools on the cold flank.

regions.name: Stonereach
regions.motif: A mining town built into grey crags.

regions.name: Frostwood
regions.motif: Spruce taiga under a low pale sun.

regions.name: Graymarch
regions.motif: A fallen monument guarded by a beastmaster.

regions.name: Frostmere
regions.motif: Frozen heath and lichen, silent and white.

regions.name: The Frostspire
regions.motif: Glacier peaks at the world's frozen north-west corner.

regions.name: Northwatch
regions.motif: Bleak grey highlands watching the volcanic north.

regions.name: The Riftlands
regions.motif: Shattered crag and chasm on the far north-east.

regions.name: Helcarn
regions.motif: The coldest reach; a white waste of drifts and ice.

regions.name: Blightmoor
regions.motif: A silent forest of black dead trees; nothing sings here.

relationships.why: The beginner home must have a bank.
Smithing belongs in the capital forge.
Players must be able to walk home to the capital across Kingsbridge.
